description: Wide open land under an endless sky where you can see for miles and there is nowhere to hide.
biomes: Neat rows of crops stretching to low fences and distant barns. The soil is dark and rich, turned by hands that know it well.
Tall grass rippling in waves under the wind. The sky is enormous here, and the horizon is a clean unbroken line.
Dry grass and hard earth under a wide sky. The wind is constant and the land rolls on without a single tree in sight.
Golden grass as far as you can see, dotted with wildflowers. The ground hums with insects and the air smells of warm earth.
Scattered trees standing alone in seas of golden grass. The heat shimmers and large shapes move slowly in the distance.
A riot of color spreading across gentle ground. Bees drone through lavender and poppy, and the air is sweet and heavy.
Empty dirt stretching flat and lifeless. Whatever grew here once is gone, and the soil has given up trying.
Blackened earth and the smell of old smoke. New green shoots push through the char, but the land remembers the fire.
Open, treeless ground under low grey clouds. The heather bends in the gale and the rain comes sideways.
